phrases.intent_en: Where is the Pastéis de Belém takeaway counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de take-away dos Pastéis de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH TAH-kih-uh-WEYE DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH bih-LAYNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Takeaway queues operate separately from dine-in service.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao pasteleiro ou ao fiscal na zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW puhsh-tih-LAY-roo OHW OW feesh-KAHL NUH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the tart baker or the zone attendant in the area.

responses.english: Ask the tart baker or the zone attendant in the area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW puhsh-tih-LAY-roo OHW OW feesh-KAHL NUH ZOH-nuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao pasteleiro ou ao fiscal na zona.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy the Jerónimos combined ticket?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o bilhete combinado dos Jerónimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih koom-bee-NAH-doo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets cover monastery and carriage museum.

likely_response.local: Pode comprar na bilheteira do mosteiro ou online.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih koomp-RAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moosh-TAY-roo OHW oong-LEE-nih.
likely_response.translation_en: You can buy it at the monastery ticket office or online.

responses.english: You can buy it at the monastery ticket office or online.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih koomp-RAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moosh-TAY-roo OHW oong-LEE-nih.
responses.local: Pode comprar na bilheteira do mosteiro ou online.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Belém Tower ticket kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira da Torre de Belém?
phrases.cultural_note: Riverfront kiosks handle peak summer queues efficiently.

likely_response.local: A bilheteira fica perto do rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket kiosk is near the river.

responses.english: The ticket kiosk is near the river.
responses.phonetic: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO REEOO.
responses.local: A bilheteira fica perto do rio.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I scan MAAT tickets?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso digitalizar os bilhetes do MAAT?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo dee-zhee-tuh-lee-ZAHR OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO MUHAHT?
phrases.cultural_note: Os bilhetes do MAAT são apenas online; a digitalização é feita no telemóvel à entrada.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um bilheteiro ou vigia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG bee-lyih-TAY-roo OHW vee-ZHEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a ticket seller or guard.

responses.english: Ask a ticket seller or guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG bee-lyih-TAY-roo OHW vee-ZHEEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte a um bilheteiro ou vigia.

phrases.intent_en: Where should I remove my hat in Jerónimos church?
phrases.text_local: Onde devo tirar o chapéu na igreja dos Jerónimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo tee-RAHR AW shuh-PEHOO NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh?
phrases.cultural_note: É um sinal de respeito tirar o chapéu dentro de igrejas.

likely_response.local: Dentro da igreja dos Jerónimos, tire o chapéu.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAYNGT-roo DUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh, TEE-rih AW shuh-PEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Inside Jerónimos church, remove your hat.

responses.english: Inside Jerónimos church, remove your hat.
responses.phonetic: DAYNGT-roo DUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh, TEE-rih AW shuh-PEHOO.
responses.local: Dentro da igreja dos Jerónimos, tire o chapéu.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Belém Tower ticket kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira da Torre de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh es-TAH-(n)uh bi-LY-TEY-rah dah TOR-reh deh beh-LEM?
phrases.cultural_note: Riverfront kiosks handle peak summer queues efficiently.

likely_response.local: Fica perto do rio, junto à Torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO REEOO, ZHOONNG-too AH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: It is near the river, next to the Tower.

responses.english: It is near the river, next to the Tower.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO REEOO, ZHOONNG-too AH TAW-rih.
responses.local: Fica perto do rio, junto à Torre.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I scan MAAT tickets?
phrases.text_local: Onde valido os bilhetes do MAAT?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee VAH-lee-doo OOSH bee-LYEH-teesh DOO EM-AH-AH-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: MAAT requires digital ticket scanning upon entry.

likely_response.local: Nas catracas da entrada principal do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH kuht-RAH-kuhsh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: At the turnstiles at the main entrance of the museum.

responses.english: At the turnstiles at the main entrance of the museum.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH kuht-RAH-kuhsh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Nas catracas da entrada principal do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Where should I remove my hat in Jerónimos church?
phrases.text_local: Onde tiro o chapéu na igreja dos Jerónimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih TEE-roo AW shuh-PEHOO NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Sacred etiquette requires covered shoulders and uncovered heads.

likely_response.local: À entrada, antes da nave central.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH ayngt-RAH-duh, AHNNG-tihsh DUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the atrium before the nave.

responses.english: Good morning, in the atrium before the nave.
responses.phonetic: AH ayngt-RAH-duh, AHNNG-tihsh DUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: À entrada, antes da nave central.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Belém Tower ticket kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de bilhetes da Torre de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-duh FEE-kaw kee-AWSH-kuh duh bee-LYEH-tush dah TAW-reh duh buh-LAYM
phrases.cultural_note: O quiosque de bilhetes da Torre de Belém está localizado perto do rio Tejo.

likely_response.local: No quiosque junto ao rio na Torre de Belém.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO KEEOHSH-kih ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO NUH TAW-rih DIH bih-LAYNG.
likely_response.translation_en: At the kiosk by the river at Belém Tower.

responses.english: At the kiosk by the river at Belém Tower.
responses.phonetic: NOO KEEOHSH-kih ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO NUH TAW-rih DIH bih-LAYNG.
responses.local: No quiosque junto ao rio na Torre de Belém.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira combinada dos Jerónimos?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah ah bee-lyeh-TAY-rah com-bee-NAH-dah doozh-zhay-RAW-neem-oosh

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira principal do Mosteiro dos Jerónimos, perto da entrada do claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL DOO moosh-TAY-roo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh, PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO KLOWSHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the main ticket office of the Jerónimos Monastery, near the cloister entrance.

responses.english: Go to the main ticket office of the Jerónimos Monastery, near the cloister entrance.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL DOO moosh-TAY-roo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh, PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO KLOWSHT-roo.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira principal do Mosteiro dos Jerónimos, perto da entrada do claustro.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Pastéis de Belém takeaway counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de takeaway dos Pastéis de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH tuh-keeuh-WEYE DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH bih-LAYNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Os Pastéis de Belém são famosos pelos pastéis de nata; o balcão de takeaway é separado do restaurante.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um pasteleiro ou ao fiscal.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG puhsh-tih-LAY-roo OHW OW feesh-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a tart baker or a zone attendant.

responses.english: Ask a tart baker or a zone attendant.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG puhsh-tih-LAY-roo OHW OW feesh-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte a um pasteleiro ou ao fiscal.

phrases.intent_en: Where should I remove my hat?
phrases.cultural_note: Removing headwear is mandatory inside sacred spaces.

likely_response.local: Tire o chapéu antes de entrar na igreja do Mosteiro dos Jerónimos.
likely_response.pronunciation: TEE-rih AW shuh-PEHOO AHNNG-tihsh DIH ayngt-RAHR NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO moosh-TAY-roo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Remove your hat before entering the church of the Jerónimos Monastery.

responses.english: Remove your hat before entering the church of the Jerónimos Monastery.
responses.phonetic: TEE-rih AW shuh-PEHOO AHNNG-tihsh DIH ayngt-RAHR NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO moosh-TAY-roo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh.
responses.local: Tire o chapéu antes de entrar na igreja do Mosteiro dos Jerónimos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar Pastéis de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR puhsh-TEHEESH DIH bih-LAYNG?

likely_response.local: Vá à Pastéis de Belém. Siga as placas para o local.
likely_response.pronunciation: VAH AH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH bih-LAYNG. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to Pastéis de Belém. Follow the signs to the location.

responses.english: Go to Pastéis de Belém. Follow the signs to the location.
responses.phonetic: VAH AH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH bih-LAYNG. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Vá à Pastéis de Belém. Siga as placas para o local.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a Torre de Belém?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DIH bih-LAYNG?

likely_response.translation_en: Go to the monument's ticket office.

responses.english: Go to the monument's ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy the Jerónimos combined ticket?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o bilhete combinado dos Jerónimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih koom-bee-NAH-doo DOOSH zheh-RAW-nee-moosh?
phrases.cultural_note: O bilhete combinado inclui a entrada no Mosteiro dos Jerónimos e na Torre de Belém.

likely_response.translation_en: At the Jerónimos combined ticket office.

responses.english: At the Jerónimos combined ticket office.
